DOCUMENT: AL ROUF LED Panel Light Series — Product Specification
SKU: LED-PANEL-60W | Category: Indoor Commercial

Overview
--------
The AL ROUF LED Panel Light (60W) is a premium indoor luminaire designed for office, retail,
and commercial environments. It delivers 6,600 lumens with a colour rendering index (CRI) of ≥90,
providing accurate colour representation and visual comfort.

(CRI) of ≥90, providing accurate colour representation and visual comfort.

Technical Specifications
------------------------
- Wattage: 60W (±5%)
- Luminous Flux: 6,600 lm
- Luminous Efficacy: 110 lm/W
- Colour Temperature: 3000K / 4000K / 6500K (specify on order)
- CRI: ≥90
- Beam Angle: 120°
- Input Voltage: 100–277V AC, 50/60Hz
- Power Factor: ≥0.95
- THD: <10%
- Dimensions: 600×600×12 mm
- Weight: 2.8 kg
- IP Rating: IP40 (indoor use)
- IK Rating: IK06
- Operating Temperature: -20°C to +45°C
- Lifespan: ≥50,000 hours (L70)
- Warranty: 5 years

+45°C - Lifespan: ≥50,000 hours (L70) - Warranty: 5 years

Certifications
--------------
CE, RoHS, CB, SAA (Australia), DLC (North America option)

Installation
------------
Recessed mounting into standard 600×600 mm suspended ceiling grid.
Compatible with DALI, 0-10V, and PWM dimming systems.
Minimum ceiling height: 2.5 m.

Applications
------------
Open-plan offices, retail stores, schools, hospitals, hotel lobbies.

---

------------ Open-plan offices, retail stores, schools, hospitals, hotel lobbies. ---

DOCUMENT: AL ROUF LED Street Light Series — Product Specification
SKU: LED-STREET-100W | Category: Outdoor / Street Lighting

Overview
--------
The AL ROUF LED Street Light (100W) is engineered for roadway and area illumination.
It replaces 250W HPS/MH fixtures while delivering superior photometric performance.

It replaces 250W HPS/MH fixtures while delivering superior photometric performance.

Technical Specifications
------------------------
- Wattage: 100W (±5%)
- Luminous Flux: 13,000 lm
- Luminous Efficacy: 130 lm/W
- Colour Temperature: 4000K / 5700K
- CRI: ≥70
- Beam Optics: Type II / Type III (configurable)
- Input Voltage: 100–277V AC, 50/60Hz
- Power Factor: ≥0.95
- Surge Protection: 10kV
- Dimensions: 580×270×90 mm
- Weight: 5.2 kg
- IP Rating: IP66
- IK Rating: IK09
- Operating Temperature: -40°C to +55°C
- Lifespan: ≥100,000 hours (L70)
- Warranty: 7 years

+55°C - Lifespan: ≥100,000 hours (L70) - Warranty: 7 years

Certifications
--------------
CE, RoHS, ENEC, UL (optional), IEC 62471 (photobiological safety)

Mounting
--------
Slip-fitter: 40–60 mm diameter poles.
Arm reach: 0–15° tilt adjustment.
Optional: 7-pin NEMA/ZHAGA socket for smart controls.

0–15° tilt adjustment. Optional: 7-pin NEMA/ZHAGA socket for smart controls.

Smart Controls Compatibility
-----------------------------
Compatible with TALQ, DALI-2, and proprietary NB-IoT wireless dimming systems.
Supports individual and group scheduling, energy monitoring, and fault reporting.

Applications
------------
Urban roads, highways, parking lots, industrial areas, ports.

DOCUMENT: AL ROUF Warranty & After-Sales Policy
Version: 2024-01

Standard Warranty Terms
------------------------
All AL ROUF LED products carry a standard manufacturer's warranty from the date of delivery:

carry a standard manufacturer's warranty from the date of delivery:

| Product Category       | Warranty Period |
|------------------------|-----------------|
| Indoor Commercial      | 5 years         |
| Outdoor / Street       | 7 years         |
| High Bay / Industrial  | 5 years         |
| Decorative / Retail    | 3 years         |
| Smart Control Modules  | 2 years         |

years | | Smart Control Modules | 2 years |

Warranty Coverage
-----------------
The warranty covers manufacturing defects in materials and workmanship, including:
- Driver/power supply failures
- LED module lumen depreciation below L70 within rated lifespan
- Housing corrosion under normal operating conditions

within rated lifespan - Housing corrosion under normal operating conditions

The warranty does NOT cover:
- Physical damage, vandalism, or improper installation
- Damage from voltage spikes not within specified input range (unless surge-protected model)
- Products operated outside specified temperature range
- Unauthorised modifications or repairs

operated outside specified temperature range - Unauthorised modifications or repairs

Claim Process
-------------
1. Contact AL ROUF support at warranty@alrouf.com with the order number, batch code, and description of fault.
2. AL ROUF will issue an RMA (Return Material Authorisation) number within 3 business days.
3. Return defective units freight prepaid to designated service centre.
4. AL ROUF will repair or replace at its discretion within 15 business days of receiving the RMA.

its discretion within 15 business days of receiving the RMA.

Replacement during warranty period is FOB Shenzhen. Outbound freight for replacements is covered by AL ROUF for orders over USD 5,000.

Extended Warranty
-----------------
Extended warranty (up to 10 years) available on request for projects over 500 units.
Contact your regional sales manager for terms.

---

DOCUMENT: AL ROUF Shipping & Lead Time Policy
Version: 2024-02

DOCUMENT: AL ROUF Shipping & Lead Time Policy Version: 2024-02

Standard Lead Times
--------------------
Lead times are counted from receipt of 30% advance payment and confirmed purchase order:

| Order Size            | Standard Lead Time |
|-----------------------|--------------------|
| < 100 units           | 7–10 business days |
| 100–500 units         | 15–20 business days|
| 500–2,000 units       | 25–30 business days|
| > 2,000 units         | 35–45 business days|

business days| | > 2,000 units | 35–45 business days|

Custom colour temperatures, special optics, or OEM branding add 5–10 business days.

Incoterms
----------
Default shipping terms: FOB Shenzhen.
Other available Incoterms: EXW, CIF, CFR (negotiable for orders > USD 20,000).

Shipping Methods
----------------
- Sea freight (FCL/LCL): Recommended for orders > 200 units.
- Air freight: Available for urgent orders; additional charges apply.
- Express courier (DHL/FedEx): For samples and orders < 20 units.

Express courier (DHL/FedEx): For samples and orders < 20 units.

Customs & Documentation
------------------------
AL ROUF provides: Commercial Invoice, Packing List, Bill of Lading, Certificate of Origin,
and test reports (CE/RoHS/CB) as standard. Additional certifications (UL, DLC, SAA)
available on request with 5 business days notice.

DLC, SAA) available on request with 5 business days notice.

Minimum Order Quantity (MOQ)
-----------------------------
Most products: 50 units per SKU per order.
LED tubes and downlights: 200 units per SKU.
Sample orders (pre-production): 1–5 units at standard unit price.

DOCUMENT: AL ROUF LED High Bay Light Series — Product Specification
SKU: LED-HIGHBAY-150W | Category: Industrial / High Bay

Overview
--------
The AL ROUF LED High Bay Light (150W) targets warehouses, factories, gymnasiums,
and large retail halls with ceiling heights between 6 m and 15 m.
It replaces 400W MH/HPS high-bay fixtures at significant energy savings.

It replaces 400W MH/HPS high-bay fixtures at significant energy savings.

Technical Specifications
------------------------
- Wattage: 150W (±5%)
- Luminous Flux: 19,500 lm
- Luminous Efficacy: 130 lm/W
- Colour Temperature: 4000K / 5700K
- CRI: ≥80
- Beam Angle: 60° / 90° / 120° (specify on order)
- Input Voltage: 100–277V AC, 50/60Hz
- Power Factor: ≥0.95
- THD: <10%
- Surge Protection: 6kV
- Dimensions: Ø385×210 mm (round UFO style)
- Weight: 4.5 kg
- IP Rating: IP65
- IK Rating: IK08
- Operating Temperature: -30°C to +50°C
- Lifespan: ≥80,000 hours (L70)
- Warranty: 5 years

+50°C - Lifespan: ≥80,000 hours (L70) - Warranty: 5 years

Certifications
--------------
CE, RoHS, CB, TUV, SAA (optional), DLC Premium (optional for North America)

Mounting Options
----------------
- Hook mount (standard — 1.5 m hook included)
- Pendant rod (optional — specify length)
- Surface/flange mount bracket (optional)
- Yoke bracket for wall/beam mounting (optional)

Dimming
-------
Compatible with 0-10V dimming and DALI-2. Integrated motion sensor option available (+15W standby).

dimming and DALI-2. Integrated motion sensor option available (+15W standby).

Applications
------------
Warehouses, distribution centres, manufacturing plants, gymnasiums, supermarkets.

---

DOCUMENT: AL ROUF Pricing & Payment FAQ

Q: What is the pricing structure?
A: AL ROUF uses tiered volume pricing. Unit prices decrease at standard breakpoints of 50, 100,
500, 1,000, and 5,000 units. Exact pricing is provided in formal quotations valid for 30 days.

pricing is provided in formal quotations valid for 30 days.

Q: What currencies does AL ROUF accept?
A: USD is the primary trading currency. EUR, GBP, and AED are also accepted for orders over
USD 10,000 with prior agreement.

also accepted for orders over USD 10,000 with prior agreement.

Q: What payment terms are available?
A: Standard terms are 30% advance payment with purchase order confirmation, and 70% balance
before shipment. Letter of Credit (LC at sight) is available for orders over USD 50,000.
Established distributors may negotiate 30-day net terms after 6 months of trading history.

negotiate 30-day net terms after 6 months of trading history.

Q: Are samples available?
A: Yes. Pre-production samples are available at standard unit price plus courier cost.
Sample lead time is 3–5 business days for standard products.

Q: Are OEM / private label services offered?
A: Yes. AL ROUF offers OEM packaging, custom colour boxes, firmware branding for smart
products, and printed labels. MOQ for OEM branding is 500 units. Lead time +7 business days.

OEM branding is 500 units. Lead time +7 business days.

Q: Is there a distributor programme?
A: Yes. AL ROUF operates a tiered distributor programme (Silver / Gold / Platinum) with
exclusive territory options, marketing support, and enhanced warranty pass-through.
Contact sales@alrouf.com for the distributor application form.
